# Development Commands

Extracted from `justfile`. Always use `uv run` for Python commands.

| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| `just setup` | First-time setup: install deps + pre-commit hooks |
| `just all` | Full pipeline: scan -> seed -> generate -> docs |
| `just scan` | Introspect ADK -> manifest.json |
| `just seed` | manifest.json -> seed.toml |
| `just generate` | seed.toml + manifest.json -> code (self-formatting) |
| `just stubs` | Regenerate .pyi stubs only |
| `just lint` | Lint hand-written files (ruff check + format check) |
| `just fmt` | Auto-format hand-written files (ruff) |
| `just fmt-changed` | Auto-format only changed hand-written files (fast) |
| `just check-gen` | Verify generated files are up-to-date |
| `just preflight` | Run pre-commit hooks (mirrors CI lint) |
| `just ci` | Full local CI: preflight + check-gen + test |
| `just test` | Run pytest suite |
| `just test-pipeline` | Run pipeline tests only (fast <5s) |
| `just update-golden` | Regenerate golden files |
| `just typecheck` | Run pyright type-check |
| `just watch` | Auto-run generate+test on changes |
| `just repl` | Pre-loaded IPython playground |
| `just worktree` | NAME  Create isolated worktree + install deps |
| `just add-cookbook` | Scaffold new example |
| `just docs` | Generate all documentation |
| `just docs-api` | Generate API reference only |
| `just docs-cookbook` | Generate cookbook only |
| `just docs-migration` | Generate migration guide only |
| `just docs-build` | Build Sphinx HTML documentation |
| `just docs-serve` | Build and serve docs with live reload |
| `just llms` | Generate llms.txt + editor rules (CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules, etc.) |
| `just skills` | Generate agent skill references (.claude/skills/ + .gemini/skills/) |
| `just cookbook-gen` | Generate cookbook example stubs |
| `just cookbook-gen-dry` | Preview cookbook stubs (dry-run) |
| `just agents` | Convert cookbook -> adk web folders |
| `just diff` | Show changes since last scan (JSON) |
| `just diff-md` | Generate API diff as docs/generated/api-diff.md |
| `just build` | Build pip package |
| `just publish` | Publish to PyPI |
| `just clean` | Remove generated files |

## Common workflows

```bash
just setup          # First-time setup
just all            # Full pipeline: scan → seed → generate → docs
just ci             # Full local CI: preflight + check-gen + test
just test           # Run all tests
just generate       # Regenerate code from seed + manifest
just skills         # Regenerate skill references
```
